name: League Of Tacticians: Path of Tarkan
short_description: League of Tacticians is a turn-based tactical strategy game set in a medieval world. Inspired by Arco and Door Kickers, you control a squad during battle matches to help your team win the War League season.
detailed_description:
League of Tacticians is a tactical game inspired by anime-style war stories like "Kingdom."

You are part of a team (Hun Clan) competing in the War League, a tournament where battles are treated like a sport. Your goal is to help your team climb the league rankings by planning smart moves and completing objectives.

You control your squad during combat. Missions have different goals, and how well you complete them affects your team’s standing in the league.

Gameplay Features

  • Tactical Matches: Plan each move in turn-based mode, then see your strategy play out in real time.

  • League Progression: One season has 18 battles. Each match brings a new challenge.

  • Mission Goals: Complete different objectives to help your team rank higher.

  • Skill System: Earn stars by playing well and use them to unlock new skills.

  • Story Mode: Follow your team’s journey through visual novel scenes.
